journey.name: Wallet seed backup
journey.description: Opens the seed-phrase backup dialog and verifies it shows a 12-word mnemonic, then dismisses it - exercising the encrypted-storage reveal path without ever leaving the phrase logged or crashing the app.

actions.action: Launch the Mandacaru app and wait for the splash screen to dismiss (poll until nav_node is present)
Verify a dialog titled "Your seed phrase" is displayed with 12 numbered words
Tap the "Done" button to dismiss the dialog
Verify the Wallet screen (wallet_balance_card) is displayed and the app has not crashed
